cenas.dalle_prompt: A rope or towel is tied to a cabinet door handle. A dog is playing tug-of-war with the rope, causing the door to pull open. The trainer is encouraging the play. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A dynamic shot capturing the playful tugging and the resulting door movement.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The moment the door opens, the trainer gives a huge reward. The trainer then points to the rope and says the command, e.g., "Abre". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera focuses on the reward, then on the clear hand signal pointing to the rope.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Now, the trainer points to the rope and says "Abre". The dog grabs the rope and pulls the door open. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A clear shot of the dog performing the action on command. A "Jackpot!" animation celebrates the success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: For closing, a sticky note target is placed on the outside of the door. The dog is rewarded for pushing the target with its nose, causing the door to swing shut. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A close-up on the dog pushing the target and the door closing, with a satisfying "click" sound effect.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a person with their hands full of groceries, saying "Porta, por favor!", and the dog helpfully pulling a door open for them. Text overlay: "O Porteiro Mais Fofo do Mundo". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A practical, heartwarming shot of the dog being genuinely helpful. The text appears in a friendly, welcoming font.
